mechanism_narrative: A sustained federal funds rate near zero signals maximum monetary accommodation that compresses equity discount rates and supports positive S&P 500 forward returns.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline.

mechanism_narrative: Unemployment rate crossing above seven percent signals severe labor market deterioration that triggers recessionary earnings revisions and negative equity returns.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns are positive in greater than fifty-five percent of instances when unemployment exceeds seven percent.

mechanism_narrative: Divergence between falling industrial production and stable employment indicates inventory buildup rather than demand collapse, supporting near-term equity rebounds.
failure_condition: Joint signal shows no predictive power with Rank IC below 0.01, or returns are negative in greater than sixty percent of triggered cases.

mechanism_narrative: Retail sales dropping below three hundred thirty thousand million dollars signals severe consumer contraction, forcing corporate earnings downgrades and negative equity returns.
failure_condition: Positive returns occur in greater than fifty percent of instances when retail sales fall below the three hundred thirty thousand threshold.

mechanism_narrative: Low inflation combined with zero lower bound rates creates a liquidity trap where monetary policy loses transmission, leading to prolonged equity stagnation.
failure_condition: Sixty-day forward returns are positive in greater than sixty-five percent of instances during liquidity trap conditions.

mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month payroll declines directly reduce aggregate income expectations, triggering immediate negative equity price adjustments.
failure_condition: Five-day forward returns are positive in greater than fifty-five percent of instances following payroll declines.

mechanism_narrative: Industrial production index falling below ninety-five signals severe manufacturing contraction, reducing corporate profit margins and driving negative equity returns.
failure_condition: Rank IC remains below 0.03 over rolling three-year windows when industrial production falls below ninety-five.

mechanism_narrative: Synchronized declines in real GDP and housing starts confirm a systemic demand shock, prolonging economic weakness and suppressing equity valuations over the quarter.
failure_condition: Sixty-day forward returns are positive in greater than sixty percent of instances when both series decline simultaneously.
